scripts.build: node scripts/inject-config.js && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' --exclude='.git' --exclude='*.lock' --exclude='apple-extension' ./ dist/
scripts.build:dev: EXTENSION_BASE_URL=http://localhost:58000 node scripts/inject-config.js && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' --exclude='.git' --exclude='*.lock' --exclude='apple-extension' ./ dist/
scripts.build:prod: EXTENSION_BASE_URL=https://grabcaramel.com node scripts/inject-config.js && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='dist' --exclude='.git' --exclude='*.lock' --exclude='apple-extension' ./ dist/
